name: Sausage and Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a casserole or large skillet. Cook the sausage for 2 minutes on each side.
2. Pour off most of the fat.
3. Add onions, garlic, red peppers (sewed and sliced), green pepper (seeded and diced), tomato paste, white wine, fennel seeds, salt, and white pepper.
4. Cover and cook over low heat for 25 minutes.
